arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ لِتَنَالَ رِضْوَانَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَتَسْكُنَ فِي جِنَانِ الْخُلْدِ. [1]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (1)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 1)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 1)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ نَنْجُ سَ بُرُومْ تِ دُنْدْ سَ اَجَّنَ [1]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ وَالْآخِرَةُ هِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ. [2]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah fa-innal-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥadin wal-ākhiratu hiyal-ḥayawān. (2)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone, and the Hereafter is the true life. (Stanza 2)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, ndax àdduna du yàgg ci kenn, te àllaxira mooy kër dëgg-dëgg ga. (Wers 2)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [2]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ وَبِذَلِكَ تَكُونُ مِنَ الْفَائِزِينَ الَّذِينَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ. [3]
latinTransliteration: Fal-mawtu ya'tī baghtaten fa-tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli wal-ḥisāb wa bi-dhālika takūnu minal-fā'izīnal-ladhīna lā khawfun ‘alayhim. (3)
englishTranslation: For death comes suddenly, so provision yourself for the day of departure and reckoning, and by that you will be among the successful ones who have no fear. (Stanza 3)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dee gu gaaw la, kon sàkkal sa bopp yool ca bisu àllaxira, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 3)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِ جُ جَاوْ لَ كُنْ سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [3]

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِمُلَازَمَةِ الصِّدْقِ وَالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [4]
latinTransliteration: Wa ‘alayka bi-mulāzametiṣ-ṣidqi wal-ikhlāṣi fī kulli amr fal-khāsiru man bā‘a ākhiratahu bi-‘araḍin minad-dunyā qalīl. (4)
englishTranslation: And you must maintain truthfulness and sincerity in every single affair, for the loser is whoever sold his hereafter for a small, miserable worldly portion. (Stanza 4)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te war na ci yaw dëgëral dëgg ak sellal ca say jëf sa sùnek, ndax ku xàllé àllaxiram ca mbirum àdduna gu néew mu rëy lool. (Wers 4)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرْ نَ سِ يَوْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ دِٜجّ اَكْ سِلَّلْ سَ سَيْ جِٜfْ سَ سُنِكْ نْدَخْ كُ خَلِّ اَلَّخِرَمْ سَ مْبِرُمْ اَدُّنَ جُ نِيوْ مُ رِي لُولْ [4]

arabicText: فَالْخَوْفُ مِنَ اللَّهِ هُوَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ وَبِهَذَا تَتَزَيَّنُ الرُّوحُ بِأَنْوَارِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ. [5]
latinTransliteration: Fal-khawfu minallāhi huwa miftāḥu kulli khayrin wa falāḥ wa bi-hādhā tatazayyanur-rūḥu bi-anwāril-qurbi wal-ma‘rifetir-rabbāniyyah. (5)
englishTranslation: For fear of Allah is the ultimate key to all goodness and success, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax ragal Yàlla mooy ubbéeg bépp baax ak ubbéem, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ رَجَلْ يَٚlَّ مُويْ أُبِّيجْ بِيقْ بَآخْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [5]

arabicText: وَتُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا قَبْلَ فَوَاتِ الْأَوانِ لِأَنَّ صَفَاءَ الْقَلْبِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ فِي قَبُولِ جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ. [6]
latinTransliteration: Wa tub ilā Rabbika tawbaten naṣūḥan qabla fawātil-awān li'anna ṣafā'al-qalbi huwal-aṣlu fī qabūli jamī‘il-a‘māl. (6)
englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, because purity of heart is the foundation in the acceptance of all deeds. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [6]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فَاصْبِرْ عَلَى طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي طِيلَةَ الْعُمْرِ. [7]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak fa-ṣbir ‘alā ṭā‘atillāhi wa ‘anil-ma‘āṣī ṭīlatel-‘umr. (7)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, so endure in obedience to Allah and away from sins throughout your life. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, muñal ci liggeeyal sa Boroom te sori say bàkkar sa dund. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [7]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [8]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (8)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 8)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [8]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [9]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (9)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 9)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 9)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [9]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [10]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (10)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 10)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 10)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [10]

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [11]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (11)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 11)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 11)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [11]

englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 16)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 16)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [16]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ لِأَنَّ صَفَاءَ الْقَلْبِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ فِي قَبُولِ جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ. [17]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak li'anna ṣafā'al-qalbi huwal-aṣlu fī qabūli jamī‘il-a‘māl. (17)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, because purity of heart is the foundation in the acceptance of all deeds. (Stanza 17)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 17)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [17]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً فَاصْبِرْ عَلَى طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي طِيلَةَ الْعُمْرِ. [18]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā fa-ṣbir ‘alā ṭā‘atillāhi wa ‘anil-ma‘āṣī ṭīlatel-‘umr. (18)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, so endure in obedience to Allah and away from sins throughout your life. (Stanza 18)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, muñal ci liggeeyal sa Boroom te sori say bàkkar sa dund. (Wers 18)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [18]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [19]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (19)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 19)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 19)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [19]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [20]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (20)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 20)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 20)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [20]

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [21]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (21)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 21)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 21)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [21]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [22]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (22)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 22)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 22)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [22]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ لِتَنَالَ رِضْوَانَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَتَسْكُنَ فِي جِنَانِ الْخُلْدِ. [23]
latinTransliteration: Fal-mawtu ya'tī baghtaten fa-tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli wal-ḥisāb li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (23)
englishTranslation: For death comes suddenly, so provision yourself for the day of departure and reckoning, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 23)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dee gu gaaw la, kon sàkkal sa bopp yool ca bisu àllaxira, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 23)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِ جُ جَاوْ لَ كُنْ سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ نَنْجُ سَ بُرُومْ تِ دُنْدْ سَ اَجَّنَ [23]

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِمُلَازَمَةِ الصِّدْقِ وَالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ وَالْآخِرَةُ هِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ. [24]
latinTransliteration: Wa ‘alayka bi-mulāzametiṣ-ṣidqi wal-ikhlāṣi fī kulli amr fa-innal-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥadin wal-ākhiratu hiyal-ḥayawān. (24)
englishTranslation: And you must maintain truthfulness and sincerity in every single affair, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone, and the Hereafter is the true life. (Stanza 24)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te war na ci yaw dëgëral dëgg ak sellal ca say jëf sa sùnek, ndax àdduna du yàgg ci kenn, te àllaxira mooy kër dëgg-dëgg ga. (Wers 24)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرْ نَ سِ يَوْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ دِٜجّ اَكْ سِلَّلْ سَ سَيْ جِٜfْ سَ سُنِكْ نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [24]

arabicText: فَالْخَوْفُ مِنَ اللَّهِ هُوَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ وَبِذَلِكَ تَكُونُ مِنَ الْفَائِزِينَ الَّذِينَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ. [25]
latinTransliteration: Fal-khawfu minallāhi huwa miftāḥu kulli khayrin wa falāḥ wa bi-dhālika takūnu minal-fā'izīnal-ladhīna lā khawfun ‘alayhim. (25)
englishTranslation: For fear of Allah is the ultimate key to all goodness and success, and by that you will be among the successful ones who have no fear. (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax ragal Yàlla mooy ubbéeg bépp baax ak ubbéem, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ رَجَلْ يَٚlَّ مُويْ أُبِّيجْ بِيقْ بَآخْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [25]

arabicText: وَتُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا قَبْلَ فَوَاتِ الْأَوانِ فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [26]
latinTransliteration: Wa tub ilā Rabbika tawbaten naṣūḥan qabla fawātil-awān fal-khāsiru man bā‘a ākhiratahu bi-‘araḍin minad-dunyā qalīl. (26)
englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, for the loser is whoever sold his hereafter for a small, miserable worldly portion. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, ndax ku xàllé àllaxiram ca mbirum àdduna gu néew mu rëy lool. (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ نْدَخْ كُ خَلِّ اَلَّخِرَمْ سَ مْبِرُمْ اَدُّنَ جُ نِيوْ مُ رِي لُولْ [26]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَبِهَذَا تَتَزَيَّنُ الرُّوحُ بِأَنْوَارِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ. [27]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak wa bi-hādhā tatazayyanur-rūḥu bi-anwāril-qurbi wal-ma‘rifetir-rabbāniyyah. (27)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [27]

wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [31]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [32]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (32)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 32)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [32]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [33]
latinTransliteration: Fal-mawtu ya'tī baghtaten fa-tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli wal-ḥisāb li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (33)
englishTranslation: For death comes suddenly, so provision yourself for the day of departure and reckoning, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dee gu gaaw la, kon sàkkal sa bopp yool ca bisu àllaxira, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 33)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِ جُ جَاوْ لَ كُنْ سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [33]

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِمُلَازَمَةِ الصِّدْقِ وَالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ لِتَنَالَ رِضْوَانَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَتَسْكُنَ فِي جِنَانِ الْخُلْدِ. [34]
latinTransliteration: Wa ‘alayka bi-mulāzametiṣ-ṣidqi wal-ikhlāṣi fī kulli amr li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (34)
englishTranslation: And you must maintain truthfulness and sincerity in every single affair, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 34)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te war na ci yaw dëgëral dëgg ak sellal ca say jëf sa sùnek, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 34)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرْ نَ سِ يَوْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ دِٜجّ اَكْ سِلَّلْ سَ سَيْ جِٜfْ سَ سُنِكْ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ نَنْجُ سَ بُرُومْ تِ دُنْدْ سَ اَجَّنَ [34]

arabicText: فَالْخَوْفُ مِنَ اللَّهِ هُوَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ وَالْآخِرَةُ هِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ. [35]
latinTransliteration: Fal-khawfu minallāhi huwa miftāḥu kulli khayrin wa falāḥ fa-innal-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥadin wal-ākhiratu hiyal-ḥayawān. (35)
englishTranslation: For fear of Allah is the ultimate key to all goodness and success, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone, and the Hereafter is the true life. (Stanza 35)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax ragal Yàlla mooy ubbéeg bépp baax ak ubbéem, ndax àdduna du yàgg ci kenn, te àllaxira mooy kër dëgg-dëgg ga. (Wers 35)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ رَجَلْ يَٚlَّ مُويْ أُبِّيجْ بِيقْ بَآخْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [35]

arabicText: وَتُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا قَبْلَ فَوَاتِ الْأَوانِ وَبِذَلِكَ تَكُونُ مِنَ الْفَائِزِينَ الَّذِينَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ. [36]
latinTransliteration: Wa tub ilā Rabbika tawbaten naṣūḥan qabla fawātil-awān wa bi-dhālika takūnu minal-fā'izīnal-ladhīna lā khawfun ‘alayhim. (36)
englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, and by that you will be among the successful ones who have no fear. (Stanza 36)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 36)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [36]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [37]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak fal-khāsiru man bā‘a ākhiratahu bi-‘araḍin minad-dunyā qalīl. (37)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, for the loser is whoever sold his hereafter for a small, miserable worldly portion. (Stanza 37)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, ndax ku xàllé àllaxiram ca mbirum àdduna gu néew mu rëy lool. (Wers 37)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ نْدَخْ كُ خَلِّ اَلَّخِرَمْ سَ مْبِرُمْ اَدُّنَ جُ نِيوْ مُ رِي لُولْ [37]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً وَبِهَذَا تَتَزَيَّنُ الرُّوحُ بِأَنْوَارِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ. [38]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā wa bi-hādhā tatazayyanur-rūḥu bi-anwāril-qurbi wal-ma‘rifetir-rabbāniyyah. (38)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 38)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 38)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [38]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً لِأَنَّ صَفَاءَ الْقَلْبِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ فِي قَبُولِ جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ. [39]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā li'anna ṣafā'al-qalbi huwal-aṣlu fī qabūli jamī‘il-a‘māl. (39)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, because purity of heart is the foundation in the acceptance of all deeds. (Stanza 39)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 39)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [39]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ فَاصْبِرْ عَلَى طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي طِيلَةَ الْعُمْرِ. [40]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān fa-ṣbir ‘alā ṭā‘atillāhi wa ‘anil-ma‘āṣī ṭīlatel-‘umr. (40)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, so endure in obedience to Allah and away from sins throughout your life. (Stanza 40)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, muñal ci liggeeyal sa Boroom te sori say bàkkar sa dund. (Wers 40)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [40]

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [41]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (41)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 41)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 41)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [41]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [42]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (42)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 42)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 42)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [42]

wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [46]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَبِذَلِكَ تَكُونُ مِنَ الْفَائِزِينَ الَّذِينَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ. [47]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak wa bi-dhālika takūnu minal-fā'izīnal-ladhīna lā khawfun ‘alayhim. (47)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, and by that you will be among the successful ones who have no fear. (Stanza 47)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 47)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [47]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [48]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā fal-khāsiru man bā‘a ākhiratahu bi-‘araḍin minad-dunyā qalīl. (48)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, for the loser is whoever sold his hereafter for a small, miserable worldly portion. (Stanza 48)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, ndax ku xàllé àllaxiram ca mbirum àdduna gu néew mu rëy lool. (Wers 48)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ نْدَخْ كُ خَلِّ اَلَّخِرَمْ سَ مْبِرُمْ اَدُّنَ جُ نِيوْ مُ رِي لُولْ [48]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً وَبِهَذَا تَتَزَيَّنُ الرُّوحُ بِأَنْوَارِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ. [49]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā wa bi-hādhā tatazayyanur-rūḥu bi-anwāril-qurbi wal-ma‘rifetir-rabbāniyyah. (49)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 49)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 49)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [49]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ لِأَنَّ صَفَاءَ الْقَلْبِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ فِي قَبُولِ جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ. [50]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān li'anna ṣafā'al-qalbi huwal-aṣlu fī qabūli jamī‘il-a‘māl. (50)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, because purity of heart is the foundation in the acceptance of all deeds. (Stanza 50)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 50)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [50]

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ فَاصْبِرْ عَلَى طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي طِيلَةَ الْعُمْرِ. [51]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr fa-ṣbir ‘alā ṭā‘atillāhi wa ‘anil-ma‘āṣī ṭīlatel-‘umr. (51)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, so endure in obedience to Allah and away from sins throughout your life. (Stanza 51)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, muñal ci liggeeyal sa Boroom te sori say bàkkar sa dund. (Wers 51)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [51]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [52]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (52)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 52)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 52)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [52]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [53]
latinTransliteration: Fal-mawtu ya'tī baghtaten fa-tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli wal-ḥisāb fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (53)
englishTranslation: For death comes suddenly, so provision yourself for the day of departure and reckoning, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 53)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dee gu gaaw la, kon sàkkal sa bopp yool ca bisu àllaxira, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 53)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِ جُ جَاوْ لَ كُنْ سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [53]

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِمُلَازَمَةِ الصِّدْقِ وَالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [54]
latinTransliteration: Wa ‘alayka bi-mulāzametiṣ-ṣidqi wal-ikhlāṣi fī kulli amr wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (54)
englishTranslation: And you must maintain truthfulness and sincerity in every single affair, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 54)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te war na ci yaw dëgëral dëgg ak sellal ca say jëf sa sùnek, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 54)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرْ نَ سِ يَوْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ دِٜجّ اَكْ سِلَّلْ سَ سَيْ جِٜfْ سَ سُنِكْ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [54]

arabicText: فَالْخَوْفُ مِنَ اللَّهِ هُوَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [55]
latinTransliteration: Fal-khawfu minallāhi huwa miftāḥu kulli khayrin wa falāḥ li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (55)
englishTranslation: For fear of Allah is the ultimate key to all goodness and success, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 55)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax ragal Yàlla mooy ubbéeg bépp baax ak ubbéem, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 55)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ رَجَلْ يَٚlَّ مُويْ أُبِّيجْ بِيقْ بَآخْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [55]

arabicText: وَتُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا قَبْلَ فَوَاتِ الْأَوانِ لِتَنَالَ رِضْوَانَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَتَسْكُنَ فِي جِنَانِ الْخُلْدِ. [56]
latinTransliteration: Wa tub ilā Rabbika tawbaten naṣūḥan qabla fawātil-awān li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (56)
englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 56)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 56)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ نَنْجُ سَ بُرُومْ تِ دُنْدْ سَ اَجَّنَ [56]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ وَالْآخِرَةُ هِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ. [57]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak fa-innal-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥadin wal-ākhiratu hiyal-ḥayawān. (57)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone, and the Hereafter is the true life. (Stanza 57)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, ndax àdduna du yàgg ci kenn, te àllaxira mooy kër dëgg-dëgg ga. (Wers 57)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [57]

wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 58)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [58]

wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 61)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [61]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ فَاصْبِرْ عَلَى طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي طِيلَةَ الْعُمْرِ. [62]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah fa-ṣbir ‘alā ṭā‘atillāhi wa ‘anil-ma‘āṣī ṭīlatel-‘umr. (62)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, so endure in obedience to Allah and away from sins throughout your life. (Stanza 62)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, muñal ci liggeeyal sa Boroom te sori say bàkkar sa dund. (Wers 62)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [62]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [63]
latinTransliteration: Fal-mawtu ya'tī baghtaten fa-tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli wal-ḥisāb wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (63)
englishTranslation: For death comes suddenly, so provision yourself for the day of departure and reckoning, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 63)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dee gu gaaw la, kon sàkkal sa bopp yool ca bisu àllaxira, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 63)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِ جُ جَاوْ لَ كُنْ سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [63]

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِمُلَازَمَةِ الصِّدْقِ وَالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [64]
latinTransliteration: Wa ‘alayka bi-mulāzametiṣ-ṣidqi wal-ikhlāṣi fī kulli amr fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (64)
englishTranslation: And you must maintain truthfulness and sincerity in every single affair, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 64)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te war na ci yaw dëgëral dëgg ak sellal ca say jëf sa sùnek, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 64)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرْ نَ سِ يَوْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ دِٜجّ اَكْ سِلَّلْ سَ سَيْ جِٜfْ سَ سُنِكْ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [64]

arabicText: فَالْخَوْفُ مِنَ اللَّهِ هُوَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [65]
latinTransliteration: Fal-khawfu minallāhi huwa miftāḥu kulli khayrin wa falāḥ wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (65)
englishTranslation: For fear of Allah is the ultimate key to all goodness and success, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 65)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax ragal Yàlla mooy ubbéeg bépp baax ak ubbéem, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 65)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ رَجَلْ يَٚlَّ مُويْ أُبِّيجْ بِيقْ بَآخْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [65]

arabicText: وَتُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا قَبْلَ فَوَاتِ الْأَوانِ لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [66]
latinTransliteration: Wa tub ilā Rabbika tawbaten naṣūḥan qabla fawātil-awān li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (66)
englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 66)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 66)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [66]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ لِتَنَالَ رِضْوَانَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَتَسْكُنَ فِي جِنَانِ الْخُلْدِ. [67]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (67)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 67)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 67)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ نَنْجُ سَ بُرُومْ تِ دُنْدْ سَ اَجَّنَ [67]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ وَالْآخِرَةُ هِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ. [68]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā fa-innal-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥadin wal-ākhiratu hiyal-ḥayawān. (68)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone, and the Hereafter is the true life. (Stanza 68)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, ndax àdduna du yàgg ci kenn, te àllaxira mooy kër dëgg-dëgg ga. (Wers 68)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [68]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً وَبِذَلِكَ تَكُونُ مِنَ الْفَائِزِينَ الَّذِينَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ. [69]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā wa bi-dhālika takūnu minal-fā'izīnal-ladhīna lā khawfun ‘alayhim. (69)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, and by that you will be among the successful ones who have no fear. (Stanza 69)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 69)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [69]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [70]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān fal-khāsiru man bā‘a ākhiratahu bi-‘araḍin minad-dunyā qalīl. (70)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, for the loser is whoever sold his hereafter for a small, miserable worldly portion. (Stanza 70)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, ndax ku xàllé àllaxiram ca mbirum àdduna gu néew mu rëy lool. (Wers 70)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ نْدَخْ كُ خَلِّ اَلَّخِرَمْ سَ مْبِرُمْ اَدُّنَ جُ نِيوْ مُ رِي لُولْ [70]

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ وَبِهَذَا تَتَزَيَّنُ الرُّوحُ بِأَنْوَارِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ. [71]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr wa bi-hādhā tatazayyanur-rūḥu bi-anwāril-qurbi wal-ma‘rifetir-rabbāniyyah. (71)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 71)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 71)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [71]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ لِأَنَّ صَفَاءَ الْقَلْبِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ فِي قَبُولِ جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ. [72]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah li'anna ṣafā'al-qalbi huwal-aṣlu fī qabūli jamī‘il-a‘māl. (72)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, because purity of heart is the foundation in the acceptance of all deeds. (Stanza 72)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 72)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [72]

wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [76]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [77]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (77)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 77)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 77)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [77]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً لِتَنَالَ رِضْوَانَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَتَسْكُنَ فِي جِنَانِ الْخُلْدِ. [78]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (78)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 78)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 78)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ نَنْجُ سَ بُرُومْ تِ دُنْدْ سَ اَجَّنَ [78]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ وَالْآخِرَةُ هِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ. [79]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā fa-innal-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥadin wal-ākhiratu hiyal-ḥayawān. (79)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone, and the Hereafter is the true life. (Stanza 79)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, ndax àdduna du yàgg ci kenn, te àllaxira mooy kër dëgg-dëgg ga. (Wers 79)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [79]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ وَبِذَلِكَ تَكُونُ مِنَ الْفَائِزِينَ الَّذِينَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ. [80]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān wa bi-dhālika takūnu minal-fā'izīnal-ladhīna lā khawfun ‘alayhim. (80)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, and by that you will be among the successful ones who have no fear. (Stanza 80)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 80)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [80]

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [81]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr fal-khāsiru man bā‘a ākhiratahu bi-‘araḍin minad-dunyā qalīl. (81)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, for the loser is whoever sold his hereafter for a small, miserable worldly portion. (Stanza 81)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, ndax ku xàllé àllaxiram ca mbirum àdduna gu néew mu rëy lool. (Wers 81)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي نْدَخْ كُ خَلِّ اَلَّخِرَمْ سَ مْبِرُمْ اَدُّنَ جُ نِيوْ مُ رِي لُولْ [81]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ وَبِهَذَا تَتَزَيَّنُ الرُّوحُ بِأَنْوَارِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ. [82]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah wa bi-hādhā tatazayyanur-rūḥu bi-anwāril-qurbi wal-ma‘rifetir-rabbāniyyah. (82)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 82)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 82)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [82]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ لِأَنَّ صَفَاءَ الْقَلْبِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ فِي قَبُولِ جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ. [83]
latinTransliteration: Fal-mawtu ya'tī baghtaten fa-tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli wal-ḥisāb li'anna ṣafā'al-qalbi huwal-aṣlu fī qabūli jamī‘il-a‘māl. (83)
englishTranslation: For death comes suddenly, so provision yourself for the day of departure and reckoning, because purity of heart is the foundation in the acceptance of all deeds. (Stanza 83)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dee gu gaaw la, kon sàkkal sa bopp yool ca bisu àllaxira, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 83)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِ جُ جَاوْ لَ كُنْ سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [83]

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِمُلَازَمَةِ الصِّدْقِ وَالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ فَاصْبِرْ عَلَى طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي طِيلَةَ الْعُمْرِ. [84]
latinTransliteration: Wa ‘alayka bi-mulāzametiṣ-ṣidqi wal-ikhlāṣi fī kulli amr fa-ṣbir ‘alā ṭā‘atillāhi wa ‘anil-ma‘āṣī ṭīlatel-‘umr. (84)
englishTranslation: And you must maintain truthfulness and sincerity in every single affair, so endure in obedience to Allah and away from sins throughout your life. (Stanza 84)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te war na ci yaw dëgëral dëgg ak sellal ca say jëf sa sùnek, muñal ci liggeeyal sa Boroom te sori say bàkkar sa dund. (Wers 84)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرْ نَ سِ يَوْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ دِٜجّ اَكْ سِلَّلْ سَ سَيْ جِٜfْ سَ سُنِكْ مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [84]

arabicText: فَالْخَوْفُ مِنَ اللَّهِ هُوَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [85]
latinTransliteration: Fal-khawfu minallāhi huwa miftāḥu kulli khayrin wa falāḥ wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (85)
englishTranslation: For fear of Allah is the ultimate key to all goodness and success, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 85)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax ragal Yàlla mooy ubbéeg bépp baax ak ubbéem, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 85)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ رَجَلْ يَٚlَّ مُويْ أُبِّيجْ بِيقْ بَآخْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [85]

arabicText: وَتُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا قَبْلَ فَوَاتِ الْأَوانِ فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [86]
latinTransliteration: Wa tub ilā Rabbika tawbaten naṣūḥan qabla fawātil-awān fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (86)
englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 86)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 86)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [86]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [87]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (87)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 87)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 87)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [87]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [88]

wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 88)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [88]

latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (89)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 89)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 89)

wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 91)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [91]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [92]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah fal-khāsiru man bā‘a ākhiratahu bi-‘araḍin minad-dunyā qalīl. (92)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, for the loser is whoever sold his hereafter for a small, miserable worldly portion. (Stanza 92)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, ndax ku xàllé àllaxiram ca mbirum àdduna gu néew mu rëy lool. (Wers 92)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ نْدَخْ كُ خَلِّ اَلَّخِرَمْ سَ مْبِرُمْ اَدُّنَ جُ نِيوْ مُ رِي لُولْ [92]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ وَبِهَذَا تَتَزَيَّنُ الرُّوحُ بِأَنْوَارِ الْقُرْبِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ. [93]
latinTransliteration: Fal-mawtu ya'tī baghtaten fa-tazawwad li-yawmir-raḥīli wal-ḥisāb wa bi-hādhā tatazayyanur-rūḥu bi-anwāril-qurbi wal-ma‘rifetir-rabbāniyyah. (93)
englishTranslation: For death comes suddenly, so provision yourself for the day of departure and reckoning, and by this the spirit is adorned with the lights of proximity and divine gnosis. (Stanza 93)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dee gu gaaw la, kon sàkkal sa bopp yool ca bisu àllaxira, te ci lolu la ruu di rafeté and ak leeraay yu rëy ca sa Boroom. (Wers 93)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِ جُ جَاوْ لَ كُنْ سَࣺكَّلْ سَ بُپْ يُولْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ رُو دِ رَفِتِ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي سَ سَ بُرُومْ [93]

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِمُلَازَمَةِ الصِّدْقِ وَالْإِخْلَاصِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ لِأَنَّ صَفَاءَ الْقَلْبِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ فِي قَبُولِ جَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَالِ. [94]
latinTransliteration: Wa ‘alayka bi-mulāzametiṣ-ṣidqi wal-ikhlāṣi fī kulli amr li'anna ṣafā'al-qalbi huwal-aṣlu fī qabūli jamī‘il-a‘māl. (94)
englishTranslation: And you must maintain truthfulness and sincerity in every single affair, because purity of heart is the foundation in the acceptance of all deeds. (Stanza 94)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te war na ci yaw dëgëral dëgg ak sellal ca say jëf sa sùnek, ndax laabug xol mooy ndëgërlay ñu nangu say jëf yépp. (Wers 94)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرْ نَ سِ يَوْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ دِٜجّ اَكْ سِلَّلْ سَ سَيْ جِٜfْ سَ سُنِكْ نْدَخْ لَابُجْ خُلْ مُويْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ نُ نَنْجُ سَيْ جِٜfْ يِٚpْ [94]

arabicText: فَالْخَوْفُ مِنَ اللَّهِ هُوَ مِفْتَاحُ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ وَفَلَاحٍ فَاصْبِرْ عَلَى طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَعَنِ الْمَعَاصِي طِيلَةَ الْعُمْرِ. [95]
latinTransliteration: Fal-khawfu minallāhi huwa miftāḥu kulli khayrin wa falāḥ fa-ṣbir ‘alā ṭā‘atillāhi wa ‘anil-ma‘āṣī ṭīlatel-‘umr. (95)
englishTranslation: For fear of Allah is the ultimate key to all goodness and success, so endure in obedience to Allah and away from sins throughout your life. (Stanza 95)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax ragal Yàlla mooy ubbéeg bépp baax ak ubbéem, muñal ci liggeeyal sa Boroom te sori say bàkkar sa dund. (Wers 95)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ رَجَلْ يَٚlَّ مُويْ أُبِّيجْ بِيقْ بَآخْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [95]

arabicText: وَتُبْ إِلَى رَبِّكَ تَوْبَةً نَصُوحًا قَبْلَ فَوَاتِ الْأَوانِ وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [96]
latinTransliteration: Wa tub ilā Rabbika tawbaten naṣūḥan qabla fawātil-awān wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (96)
englishTranslation: And repent to your Lord with sincere repentance before it is too late, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 96)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuubal ci sa Boroom tuub gu sell bala sa dund di jex, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 96)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [96]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [97]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (97)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 97)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 97)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [97]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [98]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (98)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 98)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 98)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [98]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [99]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (99)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 99)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 99)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [99]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ لِتَنَالَ رِضْوَانَ الرَّحْمَنِ وَتَسْكُنَ فِي جِنَانِ الْخُلْدِ. [100]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān li-tanāla riḍwānar-Raḥmāni wa taskuna fī jinānil-khuld. (100)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, to attain the pleasure of the All-Merciful and dwell in the gardens of eternity. (Stanza 100)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, ngir nga am nangu sa Boroom te dund ca àjjana. (Wers 100)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ نَنْجُ سَ بُرُومْ تِ دُنْدْ سَ اَجَّنَ [100]

arabicText: يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُرِيدُ طَهِّرْ قَلْبَكَ مِنَ الْحَسَدِ وَالْكِبْرِ فَإِنَّ الدُّنْيَا لَا تَدُومُ لِأَحَدٍ وَالْآخِرَةُ هِيَ الْحَيَوَانُ. [101]
latinTransliteration: Yā ayyuhal-murīdu ṭahhir qalbaka minal-ḥasadi wal-kibr fa-innal-dunyā lā tadūmu li-aḥadin wal-ākhiratu hiyal-ḥayawān. (101)
englishTranslation: O seeker, purify your heart from envy and pride, for this worldly life does not endure for anyone, and the Hereafter is the true life. (Stanza 101)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw murid bi, laabal sa xol ci bépp bokkaale walla rëy, ndax àdduna du yàgg ci kenn, te àllaxira mooy kër dëgg-dëgg ga. (Wers 101)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ مُرِيدْ بِ لَابَلْ سَ خُلْ سِ بِيقْ بُكَّالِ وَلَّ رِي نْدَخْ اَدُّنَ دُ يَقْ سِ كِنْ تِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ جَ [101]

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الِاغْتِرَارِ بِالدُّنْيَا وَمَلَاذِهَا الْفَانِيَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ وَبِذَلِكَ تَكُونُ مِنَ الْفَائِزِينَ الَّذِينَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ. [102]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥdhar minal-ightirāri bid-dunyā wa malādhihal-fāniyetis-sarī‘ah wa bi-dhālika takūnu minal-fā'izīnal-ladhīna lā khawfun ‘alayhim. (102)
englishTranslation: And beware of deception by this world and its fleeting pleasures, and by that you will be among the successful ones who have no fear. (Stanza 102)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te moytul naxu àdduna ak dundam buy seey te gaaw, te ca lolu la sa ndam nekk and ak keneen ku dul tiit ca bis ba. (Wers 102)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ مُيْتُلْ نَخُ اَدُّنَ اَكْ دُنْدَمْ بُيْ سِي تِ جَاوْ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ كِنِينْ كُ دُلْ تِيتْ سَ بِسُ بَ [102]

arabicText: فَالْمَوْتُ يَأْتِي بَغْتَةً فَتَزَوَّدْ لِيَوْمِ الرَّحِيلِ وَالْحِسَابِ فَالْخَاسِرُ مَنْ بَاعَ آخِرَتَهُ بِعَرَضٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا قَلِيلٍ. [103]

wolofalAjamiScript: تُوبَلْ سِ سَ بُرُومْ تُوبْ جُ سِلْ بَلَ سَ دُنْدْ دِ جِخْ مُنَلْ سِ لِجِيرَلْ سَ بُرُومْ تِ صُرِ سَيْ بَٜكَّرْ سَ دُنْدْ [106]

arabicText: فَالْقَنَاعَةُ كَنْزٌ لَا يَفْنَى فَاكْتَفِ بِمَا قَسَمَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَمَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ وَمَلَاذُهُ الْأَمِينُ. [107]
latinTransliteration: Fal-qanā‘atu kanzun lā yafnā fa-ktafi bimā qasamallāhu lak wa man tawakkala ‘alallāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu wa malādhuhul-amīn. (107)
englishTranslation: For contentment is an enduring treasure, so be satisfied with what Allah allotted you, and whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for him and his secure refuge. (Stanza 107)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax qana‘a alal bu dul jex la, kon santal li sa Boroom jox la, te ku wolu sa Boroom, mu dëgëral la te nekk sa lakatu gu sell ga. (Wers 107)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ قَنَاعَة اَلَلْ بُ دُلْ جِخْ لَ كُنْ سَنْتَلْ لِ سَ بُرُومْ جُخْ لَ تِ كُ وُلُ سَ بُرُومْ مُ دِٜجِٜrَلْ لَ تِ نِكَّ سَ لَكَتُ جُ سِلْ جَ [107]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ أَنِيسَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دَائِماً فَالْهَوَى هُوَ السَّيْفُ الْقَاطِعُ الَّذِي يُهْلِكُ صَاحِبَهُ يَقِيناً. [108]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al dhikrallāhi anīsaka fis-sirri wal-‘alani dā'imā fal-hawā huwas-sayful-qāṭi‘ul-ladhī yuhliku ṣāḥibahu yaqīnā. (108)
englishTranslation: And make remembrance of Allah your companion in private and in public always, for desires are the sharp sword that surely destroys its possessor. (Stanza 108)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te defal tudd Yàlla sa andandoo ca lëndëm ak ca leer sa sùnek, ndax topp sa rëx-rëx saasi mbugal lay sotti ca kaw suuf. (Wers 108)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفَلْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ سَ اَنْدَنْدُو سَ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ نْدَخْ تُپْ سَ رِخْ رِخْ سَاسِ مْبُجَلْ لَيْ سُتِّ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ [108]

arabicText: وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا فَالْمُتَوَاضِعُ يَرْفَعُهُ اللَّهُ كَرَماً وَعَلَيْكَ بِطَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَإِحْسَانِ الْعِشْرَةِ مَعَ الْخَلْقِ كَافَّةً. [109]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tamshi fil-arḍi maraḥan fal-mutawāḍi‘u yarfa‘uhullāhu karamā wa ‘alayka bi-ṭā‘atil-wālidayni wa iḥsānil-‘ishrati ma‘al-khalqi kāffah. (109)
englishTranslation: And do not walk upon the earth with insolence, for the humble is elevated by Allah, and you must obey parents and live with excellent companionship with all creation. (Stanza 109)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul dox ca kaw suuf and ak kowe sa bopp, ndax ku toroxlu Yàlla koy yékkati, te sàmmeel say waajur te and ak nit ñi ci dëgg and ak baax. (Wers 109)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ دُخْ سَ كَوْ سُوفْ اَنْدْ اَكْ كُوِ سَ بُپْ نْدَخْ كُ تُرُخْلُ يَٚlَّ كُيْ يِيكَّتِ تِ سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَاجُرْ تِ اَنْدْ اَكْ نِتْ نْيِ سِ دِٜجّ اَنْدْ اَكْ بَآخْ [109]

arabicText: وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ كَمَا أَمَرَ الْقُرْآنُ لِتَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِلْأَخْيَارِ وَتَنَالَ شَفَاعَةَ النَّبِيِّ الْمُصْطَفَى. [110]
latinTransliteration: Wa-qṣid fī mashyika wa-ghḍuḍ min ṣawtika kamā amaral-Qur'ān li-takūna qudwaten lil-akhyāri wa tanāla shafā‘aten-Nabiyyil-Muṣṭafā. (110)
englishTranslation: And be moderate in your pace and lower your voice, as the Quran commanded, to be a role model for the righteous and receive the intercession of the Chosen Prophet. (Stanza 110)
wolofTranslationStandard: Doxal and ak teey te lower sa kàddu niki Alxuraan digle ko, ngir nga nekk ab jéigo gu rafet te am ramu Yonent bi ca bis ba. (Wers 110)
wolofalAjamiScript: دُخَلْ اَنْدْ اَكْ تِيقْ تِ لُوِࣺرْ سَ كَدُّ نِكِ اَلْخُرَانْ دِجْلِ كُ نْجِرْ نْجَ نِكَّ اَبْ جِيجُ جُ رَفِتْ تِ اَمْ رَمُ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ بِسُ بَ [110]
